goal: promote signed lobes from summaries into operator-addressable components so control can act on structured regions instead of only raw arrays

completed_before: polarity and zero crossings are structural
why_now.remaining_gap: operators still act on full fields, while components remain descriptive summaries rather than persistent control targets

source_basis: Phase 3 corridor reanchoring v1 is marked applied, with topology-first corridor behavior and signed-run diagnostics. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}
The current status still describes polarity runs and component summaries, but not persistent operator-targetable components. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

ops.name: extract_signed_components
ops.purpose: convert polarity runs and signed_field support into explicit component objects

ops.name: match_components_across_phases
ops.purpose: assign stable identities to components by overlap, sign, and center proximity

ops.name: build_component_masks
ops.purpose: produce per-component masks for targeted operator application and gating

ops.name: apply_operator_to_masked_region
ops.purpose: apply an orientation operator to a masked component region while preserving the surrounding field

ops.name: component_extraction
ops.position: after polarity/zero_crossing recomputation and before operator scoring
change: extract components from current signed topology
match them against prior phase components
store stable component identities in state.components

ops.change: score candidate operators both globally and on the dominant or selected component; combine with configurable weights

change: select active_component_id from dominant component by default
allow config to choose dominant, widest, highest-support, or global-only targeting modes
apply the chosen operator to the active component mask first, then blend with global projection

ops.purpose: allow corridor shaping to reference explicit components in addition to polarity runs

ops.change: when components are supplied, prefer component masks and support_mass over raw run-only estimates
persist components and active_component_id in artifact output
persist component_history summaries in the saved trace artifact

cases: extracts one component per contiguous nonzero polarity run
wraparound same-sign runs merge into one component
component matching preserves identity under small center drift
masked operator application changes only the targeted region
global-only mode remains close to prior behavior when component promotion is disabled

preserve: amplitude-based compatibility for peaks, bands, and readout
existing configs remain runnable when component promotion is disabled
change: operators can act on explicit lobes/components rather than only the entire field
component identity can persist across phases
trace can report structure-level control rather than only array-level effects

minimal_algorithm.extract: build components from contiguous nonzero polarity regions weighted by signed support
minimal_algorithm.match: assign stable IDs using overlap + sign + center proximity
minimal_algorithm.apply: blend masked local operator projection with global projection
minimal_algorithm.record: trace component count, identity persistence, and targeted-control metrics

acceptance_checks: components are extracted deterministically from the same signed_field state
same-sign wraparound lobes become one component
component identities persist under mild drift across phases
operators can target a selected component without corrupting unrelated regions
disabling component promotion restores behavior close to phase 3

next_after_this.name: v14_phase5_trace_salience_ethics_v1
next_after_this.goal: feed trace salience, caution pressure, and ethical hold into corridor and action admissibility
